doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely claiming no right to cure and mandatory vacating without court process, contradicting actual Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act protections.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely stating tenants have no right to cure during a 5-day pay-or-quit period and must vacate without court process, which contradicts actual Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act protections and HUD's typical tenant advocacy stance.

LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely claiming no right to cure and mandatory vacating without court process, contradicting actual Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act protections.
